hero.title: Webhooks that
hero.subtitle: Send webhooks with confidence. Automatic retries, HMAC signatures, real-time monitoring. Built for developers who need reliability.

features.title: Everything you need for webhooks
features.subtitle: Powerful features built for developers who need reliable webhook delivery.
features.smartRetriesDesc: Exponential backoff with configurable max attempts. Failed deliveries are retried automatically.
features.hmacSignaturesDesc: Every webhook is signed with SHA256. Verify authenticity with a single function call.
features.dashboardDesc: Monitor deliveries, track success rates, debug failures. Everything in one place.
features.lowLatencyDesc: Built on Rust for speed. Sub-millisecond overhead on webhook delivery.
features.dlqDesc: Failed deliveries are preserved for debugging. Nothing gets lost.
features.globalDesc: Deploy worldwide for low-latency webhook delivery to any endpoint.

faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about HookSniff
a1: HookSniff is a webhook delivery service for developers. You send webhooks, we deliver them. If they fail, we retry with exponential backoff. Think of it as a reliable middleman between your services.
q2: How is HookSniff different from Svix or Hookdeck?
a2: HookSniff is significantly cheaper (starts at $0/month vs $49+/month), supports multiple delivery methods (HTTP, WebSocket, gRPC, SQS), and includes a free tier with 10,000 webhooks/month. We also offer Standard Webhooks compliance and an embeddable portal widget.
a3: The core API and worker are MIT-licensed. SDKs are open source. The dashboard and proprietary features are source-available.
a4: Sign up for a free account, create an endpoint pointing to your server URL, and start sending webhooks through our API or SDKs. No credit card required.
q5: Do I need to install anything?
a5: No. HookSniff is a cloud service. Just sign up and use our API or SDKs. For self-hosting, we provide Docker images.
a6: Yes! Our free tier includes 10,000 webhooks/month, 5 endpoints, 100 requests/min rate limit, and 7-day retention. No credit card required.
a7: We bill monthly based on your plan. You can upgrade or downgrade at any time. We accept credit cards via Polar.sh and iyzico for Turkish customers.
q8: What happens if I exceed my plan limits?
a8: We'll send you a notification. Webhooks over the limit will be queued and delivered when your next billing cycle starts, or you can upgrade immediately.
q9: What webhook formats do you support?
a9: We support Standard Webhooks (HMAC-SHA256), Svix-compatible headers, and custom signature formats. Our SDKs handle verification automatically.
a10: Failed deliveries are retried with exponential backoff and jitter. You can configure retry policies per endpoint: fast (1s, 5s, 30s), normal (1m, 5m, 30m), or patient (5m, 30m, 2h).
a11: Yes. You can replay individual webhooks or batch-replay all failed webhooks from a time range through the dashboard or API.
q12: Do you support WebSocket or gRPC delivery?
a12: Yes. We support 4 delivery methods: HTTP, WebSocket, gRPC, and Amazon SQS. Configure per endpoint.
q13: How do you verify webhook signatures?
a13: We use HMAC-SHA256 with constant-time comparison, following the Standard Webhooks specification. Each endpoint has a unique signing secret.
a14: Yes. All data is encrypted in transit (TLS 1.3) and at rest. We use Argon2id for password hashing and never store plaintext secrets.
a15: We are working toward GDPR compliance. Our infrastructure runs on EU servers (GCP europe-west1). A Data Processing Agreement is coming soon.
cantFindAnswer: Can't find the answer you're looking for? We're here to help.

getStarted.title: Get Started with HookSniff
getStarted.subtitle: Send your first webhook in under 5 minutes. HookSniff handles delivery, retries, security, and monitoring.
getStarted.heroBadge: Free tier — no credit card required
getStarted.step1Desc: Sign up for free — no credit card required. You get 10,000 webhook deliveries per month on the free plan.
getStarted.step2Desc: Your API key authenticates requests. You can find it in your dashboard after signing up.
getStarted.keepSecret: Keep your API key secret. Never commit it to version control.
getStarted.step3Desc: Choose your language and install the SDK. HookSniff has official SDKs for 11 languages.
getStarted.step4Desc: An endpoint is a URL where HookSniff delivers your webhooks. You can create one via the SDK, API, or dashboard.
getStarted.viaDashboardDesc: Go to Endpoints → click Create Endpoint → enter your URL.
getStarted.viaApiDesc: Use the SDK code from Step 3, or send a POST request to
getStarted.tipPlayground: Tip: Use HookSniff Playground to test webhooks without a real endpoint. It gives you a temporary URL that captures all requests.
getStarted.step5Desc: Now let's send a test webhook. Use the code below or try the interactive playground.
getStarted.step6Desc: Track every webhook delivery in real-time. See success rates, debug failures, replay failed webhooks, and monitor performance.
getStarted.eventTypesDesc: Common webhook event types you can use. These are suggestions — use any event type you want.
getStarted.embedDesc: Give your customers a white-labeled webhook portal inside your own dashboard.
getStarted.customizeColors: Customize colors, logo, and fonts in
getStarted.readyDesc: Create your free account and send your first webhook in minutes.
